title: Too Young to Kiss
writer: Frances Goodrich, Albert Hackett, Everett Freeman
actors: June Allyson, Van Johnson, Gig Young
plot: Eric Wainwright (Van Johnson), a busy impresario, is besieged by hordes of wannabe concert stars, eager for their big break. One of them is Cynthia Potter (June Allyson), a talented pianist... but she can't get in to see him. When...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
